## Checklist

- [ ] The PR targets the correct branch (`dev`, not `main`)
- [ ] The branch is up to date with the target branch
- [ ] The PR addresses a single, well-defined task
- [ ] The title follows the commit conventions (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] No hardcoded values — design tokens are used for all colors, spacing and typography
- [ ] Component is visible and correct in Storybook (Angular/React) or passes `flutter test` (Flutter)
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are included
- [ ] The commit history is clean and meaningful

📖 Full contribution guidelines: https://github.com/ohmyopensource/ohmyopensource-guidelines
